titleStmt.title: SII 38.507: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 507. (A.R. No. 507 of 1912.) ŪṬṬATTŪR, LALGUDI TALUK, TIRUCHIRAPPALLI DISTRICT. On the south wall, Āṇḍavar shrine, Siddharatnēśvara temple.

p.hi: King: Tribhuvanachchakkaravatti Tribhuvanavīradēva ie., Kulōttuṅga III Year 36, Dhanus, śu. di. 3, Monday Tiruvōṇam = 16th December 1213 A.D.

summary.p: Damaged. Seems to register a sale of land by the authorities (Ādichaṇḍēśvara) of Togumāmaṇi nāyaṉār temple at Ūṟṟattūr in Ūṟṟattūr-nāḍu to two individuals, Vēḷāḷaṉ Aṇḍakkuḍaiyan Sōḍaṉ Siṟṟaṉ and Āvarlūr-uḍaiyān Tirumaḻumān Maṇavāḷaṉ. It appears that the land was purchased by a certain Periyanāchchiyār from a brāhmaṇa lady (residing) at Śrīkaṇṭa-chaturvēdimaṅgalam and donated to the temple, which in turn sold it to the above persons. Periyanāchchiyār is described as agambaḍi-peṇḍugaḷ of the temple (see last no. 506).

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
puvanaccakkaravattikaḷ tiripuvaṉaviratevaṟku yāṇṭu 3 10 6vatu taṉu nāyaṟṟu pūṟuva pakṣattu tiyaiyum tiṅkaḷki yum peṟṟa tiruvoṇattu nāḷ
vaḷanāṭṭu Ūṟṟattūrnāṭṭu Ūṟṟattūr Uṭaiya tukumāmaṇināyanār koyil Āticaṇṭecar sātanam I nār tevatānam Innāṭṭu Ū
rirukkum veḷāḷaṉ Aṇṭakkuṭaiyān coṭaṉ cīṟṟaṉukkum Āvarulūruṭaiyān tirumaḻumām maṇavāḷaṉukkum nila paṇṇik kuṭutta paricāvatu Ik �
māṟku tevatānamāka munnāḷil periya nāc nācci Innāṭṭu śrī kaṇṭaccaturvvedhimaṅkalattu pirāmaṇi kaṇakkapāṭu kalveṭṭi kuṭuttapaṭik
Ikkalveṭṭuppaṭiyāl naṉcey » māvukkum puṉcey kkum puṉcey kkum varum ciruvāparaṇattu ṭukkaṉ kumaraṉakka Eṭ ceyvānukkum I
nnaṉcey nilam Ivviruvaṟkum ku t teṉ n nāyanār koyilkāṇit tā tiruciṟṟampalamuṭai
teṇṇāyirapaṭṭan Eḻu koyilu
Ippaṭi Aṟiven Eḻuttu
Digital edition of SII 38.507 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
